# Consolation Lotachi Kem - Personal Website

> Senior Frontend Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern frontend technologies.

This website contains information about my work as a senior frontend engineer, including project showcases, contact information, and professional details. The site is built with Next.js, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://techieconso.vercel.app/): Personal introduction and overview
- [Projects](https://techieconso.vercel.app/projects): Portfolio showcasing web development projects including church management platforms, enterprise websites, marketplaces, and SaaS products
- [Contact](https://techieconso.vercel.app/contact): Contact form and information

## Projects

- [NPF Connect](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=gov.npfconnect.app): Communication and operations platform for Nigerian Police Force officers with web dashboard and mobile app.

- [Nexkro LMS](https://nexkro.com): Learning management system frontend for courses, academy onboarding, and talent development.

- [Growth Group Systems](https://www.growthgroupsystems.online/home): Nationwide Dominion City growth-group platform with leadership workspaces, rosters, reports, and national oversight.

- [HOME-CELL](https://www.crshomecell.online): Church management platform for Salvation Ministries Home Fellowship with role-based dashboards, real-time KPIs, attendance tracking, and PWA support.

- [CHAAD Energy](https://www.chaadenergy.com): Corporate website for an engineering and energy services firm with dynamic services, projects, careers, and news powered by REST APIs and Cloudinary.

- [CHAAD Engineering](https://www.chaadengineering.com): Enterprise website for ISO 9001–certified oil and gas engineering specialists with cinematic hero carousels, services catalogs, and SEO-optimized pages.

- [Ecomarine](https://site.ecomarinegroup.com): Maritime services website for container services, terminal operations, and shipping solutions.

- [MagicGames](https://playmagic.ng/): Gaming platform with user authentication, campaign systems, OTP verification, and subscription management.

- [BoroFuel](https://borofuel.org): Landing page for a fuel access and station-partner app connecting approved drivers with designated filling stations.

- [Work & Shop](https://workandshopapp.com): Marketplace platform connecting skilled professionals, vendors, and customers with authentication, bookings, payments, and real-time messaging.

- [Troo](https://troohq.com): Restaurant management software for hospitality businesses managing front-of-house, kitchen operations, and payment processing.
